title: Mollugophytum crassifolium
taxonomy: Mollugophytum crassifolium is a species of plant in the family Molluginaceae. It belongs to the kingdom Plantae and is a member of the clade Angiosperms. Further, it is classified as a dicotyledon, which is a type of flowering plant with two seed leaves. The plant's classification also places it within the class Magnoliopsida and the order Caryophyllales. This classification reflects the plant's characteristics and evolutionary relationships.
